long_description:
NRE were alerted of link between ir01a.sr01.lon05 Et17/1 <-> is16.sr02.lon05 Et53/1 going down. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19672
short_description: ir01a.sr01.lon05 Et17/1, Port-Channel26 <-> is16.sr02.lon05 Et53/1, Port-Channel1 | Link Down
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via automation.)
comment_list: [{"comment": "Link is shut\r\nwill proceed with L1 tshoot after freeze is over", "added_by": "arun.kumar.s5@ibm.com", "added_on": "2025-12-01T08:00:53Z"}]
